summary: Matrix recording has been re‑mixed and updated, but reviewers give no details on the performance itself.
review: The sole review notes that this matrix source was redone and a newer version is available via Archive.org. No specific comments are made about the band's playing, setlist highlights, or the original audio quality, leaving both show and recording assessments largely unknown.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief review that mentions a matrix redo without any positive or negative commentary on performance or sound quality, so the rating is conservative and reflects high uncertainty.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer indicates the matrix was re‑mixed ('redid this matrix again') and points to an updated version; no explicit praise or criticism of clarity, balance, or other technical aspects.
